actions.value:
If the "Processing.. Hold tight" screen is taking a very long time to proceed, it could likely be due to an issue with the verification step for your first order with Kado. This is the primary exchange handling ACH and wire transfers methods in Edge.

 

At this point, I would recommend that you send a quick email to support@kado.money - from the same email that you had logged into their services with, to inquire about your verification status and if any additional information is needed to be able to process your first order in Edge.

 

Once this issue is resolved, your future orders Buy or Sell orders with Kado will process smoothly.
